data.title: Crypto Prices Trade Sideways, But On-Chain Indicators Flash Growth
data.description:
Crypto prices trade sideways, holding within narrow ranges, yet underlying metrics point to expansion. Over the past week, Bitcoin (BTC) has oscillated between $102,000 and $105,000. Ethereum (ETH) has wavered around $2,450 to $2,550. These modest moves stand in stark contrast to accelerating on-chain fundamentals
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/07/crypto-prices-trade-sideways-but-on-chain-indicators-flash-growth/

data.title: Morgan Stanley Projects Significant Revenue Growth for xAI by 2029
data.description: According to PANews, Morgan Stanley has projected that Elon Musk's artificial intelligence startup, xAI, is expected to achieve a total revenue of $1 billion by the end of this year. The financial institution anticipates that xAI's revenue could surpass $13 billion by 2029. Additionally, Morgan Stanley forecasts that xAI's EBITDA might grow to $2.7 billion by 2027 and could reach $13.1 billion by 2029.The company is reportedly planning to invest $18 billion in expanding its data centers. Furthermore, xAI is seeking a new round of funding with a valuation of $113 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin's Potential Growth Driven by Trade Agreements and Regulatory Developments
data.description:
According to PANews, Tim Draper, founder of Draper VC, expressed on the X platform that allowing collective bargaining for employees in the United States is akin to driving a truck downhill without brakes. However, he suggested that Bitcoin could serve as a hedge against excessive government spending.

Draper remains optimistic that Bitcoin could reach $250,000 within 2025. He identified several key factors contributing to Bitcoin's growth: optimism surrounding U.S. President Donald Trump's trade agreements, the anticipated release of regulatory frameworks, and the ongoing development of Web3 applications built on the Bitcoin blockchain. Additionally, major banks are incorporating Bitcoin into their offerings, viewing it as a lower-risk asset compared to other cryptocurrencies and stocks. This confidence in Bitcoin has solidified its reputation as a store of value.

data.title: Metaplanet Establishes U.S. Headquarters in Miami Amid Bitcoin Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet, known for its Bitcoin reserve strategy, has announced the establishment of its U.S. headquarters in Miami. This announcement was made by Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich on the X platform. The company had previously unveiled a significant financing plan amounting to $5.4 billion, with the aim of acquiring a total of 210,000 BTC by the end of 2027.

data.title: Japanese listed company Remixpoint announced that it had purchased 44.8 bitcoins worth $4.7 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Magazine, Japanese listed company Remixpoint announced the purchase of 44.8 bitcoins worth US$4.7 million.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,500 USDT with a 0.97% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 07, 2025, 11:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,500 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,500 USDT, with a narrowed 0.97% increase in 24 hours.

data.title:

Bulls would want to retake the $106K-$107K area to get back into the previous range and in proximity of the all time highs.

The $100K-$101K level is key to stop this from testing down to the mid 90s I'd say.

data.title: Musician made $3M selling NFTs and lost it all to taxes and a crypto crash
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin mixer Samourai Wallet gets crypto advocacy groups backing in case dismissal push
data.description:
Crypto advocacy groups have urged the United States authorities to dismiss the case against Bitcoin mixer Samourai Wallet. The plea is coming after their amicus briefs, filed earlier this week on behalf of the platform, were rejected by a federal judge. According to the crypto advocacy groups, along with other organizations, they want the dismissal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/groups-urge-to-dismiss-samourai-wallet-case/

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by Seven Coins
data.description: According to PANews, El Salvador has increased its Bitcoin holdings by seven coins over the past week. The country's total Bitcoin reserves now stand at 6,199.18 coins, with a total value of $651 million.

data.title: El Salvador has increased its holdings by 7 BTC in the past 7 days, with a total holding of 6199.18 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that official data showed that El Salvador had increased its holdings of 7 bitcoins in the past 7 days. Its current bitcoin holdings reached 6,199.18, with a total value of US$651 million.
